rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PHILIP CHONG-U KIM
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Amount Of Expenses Of Administration Attributable To Real Property, And For Order Directing Title Company To Pay Sam Efrom Escrow Prior To Paying Encumbrances On Said Real Property, And For Expungement Of Liens
rulings.Rulings: Hearing on amount of administration expenses to be paid from escrow. Appearance required. No additional notes prepared. Counsel for the Executor filed a Declaration re Request for Ordinary and Extraordinary Fees on July 1, 2010 reducing request for statutory fees to $15,400 based on waiver of account and voluntary reduction of extraordinary fees to $11,126.60. No other pleadings have been filed as of 2:15 p.m. on Friday, July 2, 2010.
